title: OpenBoxCodebaseSchema
description: Schema structure of the Open Box website codebase to ease LLM navigation, understanding, and code modifications.

app.purpose: Application pages, routing (Next.js App Router), API endpoints, layouts, global CSS

subfolders.api: API endpoints (Discord widget data fetching, logging, contact forms)
subfolders.blogs: Blog list page and dynamic blog post pages (/blogs/[slug])
subfolders.doc: Documentation system index and dynamic articles (/doc/[slug])
subfolders.events: Community events calendar and detailed descriptions (/events/[slug])
subfolders.servers: Server directory listing active Discord servers (/servers/[slug])
subfolders.legal: Legal policies and guidelines (refund, DMCA, acceptable use, privacy, etc.)
subfolders.about: Mission statement, founders, and community background
subfolders.(auth): Authentication grouping folder for potential Discord login

components.purpose: Reusable UI components grouped by feature or utility

subfolders.ui: Shadcn UI base components (accordion, button, dialog, tabs, etc.)
subfolders.custom: Platform specific layouts (Navbar, Footer, MasterCalendar, ThemeProvider, EventCard, BlogCard, etc.)

lib.purpose: Utility helper scripts, type definitions, static data structures

files.community-data.ts: Master data arrays (servers, events, docs, teamMembers, helper getters)
files.docs.ts: Rich text sections for documentation articles
files.Blog.ts: Paragraph structures for blog post contents
files.event.ts: Rich content or settings specifically for events
files.seo.ts: SEO configuration, metadata generation, and JSON-LD schema helpers

Servers.description: Data structure representing a Discord server listing

description.description: Short tagline shown on listing cards

longDescription.description: Full description for the detail page

isLive.description: Whether server is active or 'Coming Soon'

accent.description: Tailwind gradient class for server UI highlights

inviteEnv.description: Name of the environment variable containing invite link

Event.description: Data structure representing a community event

date.description: ISO date-time string of start time

deadline.description: ISO date-time string of registration deadline

isOffline.description: True if offline, false if virtual

Blog.description: Data structure representing a blog post post-card preview

TeamMember.description: Profiles of staff, developers, or founders

workflows.adding_content: Refer to DEV-EDIT-GUIDE.md for step-by-step instructions on updating lib/community-data.ts, creating content files (lib/Blog.ts, lib/docs.ts), and modifying routes.
workflows.seo_standards: Refer to PERFORMANCE-SEO-GUIDE.md to ensure all pages implement proper metadata configurations, image optimizations, and structured JSON-LD schemas.
